refuted.finding: task-5 P1: pre/post git status --porcelain cannot detect ignored-path writes on brokers without OS-level denial
refuted.reason: task text already binds PRIMARY enforcement to broker capability-level write denial with a REQUIRED negative test at that level; porcelain is explicitly the defense-in-depth layer. An ignored-path write touches no tracked source and no staged artifact (fragments are staged from structured payloads, not tree state). An ignored-inclusive full-tree equality assertion would false-trip on Syncthing mid-fanout activity on this fleet.
